title: ononis reclinata var. mollis
intro: Ononis reclinata var. mollis is a variant of the Ononis reclinata plant, also known as the creeping restharrow, a type of flowering plant in the legume family. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial compounds. The health benefits of Ononis reclinata var. mollis include its potential to treat kidney stones, skin conditions, and digestive issues, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Herbal preparations of Ononis reclinata var. mollis include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
